description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a long-sleeve, collared shirt with a V-neck opening and fitted dark trousers. The shirt is tucked into the pants, which are secured with a prominent belt featuring a metallic buckle. The figure's shoes are low-profile and appear to be slip-on or loafers. The individual has a well-groomed, short hairstyle and a trimmed beard, giving a neat and urban appearance. The posture is upright and relaxed, with arms slightly bent and hands open at the sides. The overall look is that of a casually dressed adult suitable for city streets or public spaces.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a collared shirt, fitted trousers, belt, and loafers, standing upright with a neat hairstyle and beard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, belt buckle, facial features, and open hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the straight leg of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, the fit of the trousers, and the back of the shoes and head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm position, and the side seam of the trousers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual collared long-sleeve shirt and fitted trousers with a belt
